span.p:
Full recrawl required
admin re-approves connector in admin center

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MCP tools tab approval in Agent Registry
separate from agent approval

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Plugin manifest update does not require new package submission
but operationId changes do - test in Playground

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: No admin gate - sideload to personal Teams app

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AI-Admin or Global Admin approves in Agent Registry
Agents tab status must be Active before rollout

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
App source validation + Microsoft review
plus org-catalog gate for consumption
